roadmap_binding.workstream_goal: Make Xlooop-XCP-demo fully operational with MB-P ecosystem workflows, typed packet state, navigable UX, and recoverable autonomous execution.

missing_or_weak: Overnight run did not persist a per-slice role/skill invocation ledger before C74.
Stale local skill docs still referenced old v2 active surfaces before C74 correction.
C53-C55 queue feature_packet_path values drifted from the actual retained Feature Execution Packet folders.
Several Operations affordances were technically tested but not obvious enough to owner users from the first visible path.
enforcement_gates: visible UI E2E for Xlooop Operations
role_skill_attestation.operator_visibility_requirement: Xlooop Operations must show role/skill attestation, missing or weak harness findings, enforcement gates, and stale-doc corrections before an overnight run can be considered owner-reviewable.

queue.title: Autonomous execution program contract and verifier
queue.acceptance_summary: Run queue, local-authoritative merge policy, replenishment policy, recovery policy, verifier, and night plan are present and tested.
stop_conditions: contract cannot distinguish real CI failure from external runner issue

queue.title: MB-P projection export contract
queue.acceptance_summary: Define how MB-P can emit approved read-only operational projections consumed by Xlooop without raw private content.

queue.title: Xlooop live projection adapter
queue.acceptance_summary: Replace static projection usage with a typed adapter boundary while preserving metadata-only read mode.

queue.title: Xlooop operational projection UI
queue.acceptance_summary: Make the MB-P metadata-only projection operational inside the Xlooop workspace without creating a write path back to MB-P.

queue.title: MB-P projection view model
queue.acceptance_summary: Move projected MB-P packet operation interpretation into a runtime view-model helper so the UI consumes a stable contract.

queue.title: MB-P projection freshness
queue.acceptance_summary: Make approved MB-P projection freshness visible in Xlooop Operations so stale metadata cannot look like current operational truth.

queue.title: MB-P projection refresh request
queue.acceptance_summary: Expired MB-P projection can create a Xlooop-local owner review packet without MB-P writeback.
stop_conditions: refresh path requires MB-P write access

queue.title: Refresh lifecycle proof
queue.acceptance_summary: Projection refresh request confirms into a Xlooop work item through typed reducer/events.
stop_conditions: owner confirmation bypasses typed packet reducer
work item id collision is possible

queue.title: Refresh work item timeline
queue.acceptance_summary: Generated refresh work item exposes source lineage, permission lineage, evidence readiness, sign-off readiness, and XCP feedback readiness from Operations.

queue.title: Operations sign-off and XCP feedback
queue.acceptance_summary: Operations timeline can sign the refresh work item and expose XCP feedback readiness.
stop_conditions: XCP feedback readiness is selected from stale packet state

queue.title: Operations overnight run report
queue.acceptance_summary: Approved autonomous overnight run boundaries, caffeinate control, local-authoritative merge policy, completed slices, and next queue are visible inside Xlooop Operations.
stop_conditions: merge policy is not visible to the operator

queue.title: Operations run recovery queue
queue.acceptance_summary: Run report exposes resume rule, state files, replenishment policy, and next approved queue so overnight work can recover without chat memory.
stop_conditions: recovery state depends on chat transcript only
replenishment expands beyond approved Xlooop-XCP-demo scope

queue.title: Operations morning report surface
queue.acceptance_summary: Create a compact morning report surface summarising merged slices, local gates, CI classifications, boundaries, and remaining queue.
stop_conditions: report claims work without local evidence
report includes raw MB-P private content

queue.title: Operations packet activity ledger
queue.acceptance_summary: Expose recent governance packet reducer/EventBus activity in Operations for packet recovery and audit navigation.
stop_conditions: activity ledger bypasses typed reducer events
activity surface leaks protected source data

queue.title: Operations morning closeout and next-plan surface
queue.acceptance_summary: Turn the morning report into a navigable closeout surface showing owner review focus, merged evidence, active next plan, and protected boundaries.
stop_conditions: closeout invents work outside the approved overnight scope
owner review surface hides local-authoritative CI classification

queue.title: Operations closeout owner acknowledgement action
queue.acceptance_summary: Make the morning closeout owner-review affordance actionable through the existing typed packet reducer/EventBus path.
stop_conditions: acknowledgement creates ungoverned state outside Xlooop packet flow

queue.title: Operations closeout review queue handoff
queue.acceptance_summary: Show the closeout owner-review packet as a dedicated Operations queue item and confirm it into a recoverable work item through typed reducer/EventBus events.
stop_conditions: closeout confirmation bypasses the owner review reducer
queue handoff creates state outside Xlooop project packet lifecycle

queue.title: Operations closeout evidence and sign-off chain
queue.acceptance_summary: Advance the closeout work item from owner-confirmed to evidence-ready, signed, and XCP-feedback-ready through Operations using typed reducer/EventBus events.
stop_conditions: evidence or sign-off bypasses typed reducer/events
XCP feedback readiness emits unapproved platform events

queue.title: Operations closeout completion summary
queue.acceptance_summary: Signed closeout work item exposes a recoverable completion receipt with packet, evidence, decision, XCP feedback, graph, recovery, and navigation context.
stop_conditions: completion summary creates a second closeout state machine
completion summary hides the signed evidence or decision chain

queue.title: Operations closeout audit export readiness
queue.acceptance_summary: Signed closeout work item exposes a redacted metadata-only audit packet export surface without MB-P writeback.
stop_conditions: audit export includes raw private content
audit export claims real backend persistence

queue.title: Closeout audit export contract boundary
queue.acceptance_summary: Promote the closeout audit export payload from inline UI logic into a typed Xlooop-owned runtime contract, validator, and UI selector boundary.
stop_conditions: contract increases runtime beyond perf budget
audit export permits private raw content

queue.title: Closeout audit export metadata download
queue.acceptance_summary: Make the metadata-only closeout audit packet downloadable from Operations using the existing typed payload without backend persistence or MB-P writeback.
stop_conditions: download mutates MB-P or protected repos

queue.title: Runtime export budget guard
queue.acceptance_summary: Freeze new runtime export surfaces while the runtime bundle has low budget headroom, with a deterministic policy verifier.
stop_conditions: new runtime export surface is added without policy decision
slice mutates MB-P or protected repos

queue.title: Visible Xlooop Operations discoverability
queue.acceptance_summary: Make Personal Home expose the Xlooop workspace and route to Operations without relying on test-only navigation hooks.
stop_conditions: visible route relies on test-only navigation hooks
Xlooop workspace disappears from the first-viewport gateway
runtime budget guard becomes hidden again

queue.title: Autonomous run role/skill attestation and UX readiness review
queue.acceptance_summary: Make overnight role/skill invocation gaps visible in Operations and enforce run-state, packet-path, and stale-skill-doc checks before future autonomous runs can look complete.
stop_conditions: role/skill attestation remains hidden from the owner
Feature Execution Packet paths drift from existing folders
stale skill docs continue to point agents at v2/current-legacy surfaces
slice requires MB-P, x-front, x-docs, or XCP-platform mutation

closeout_plan.next_decision: make autonomous run role/skill invocation visible and enforceable before the next overnight approval
closeout_plan.scope: Xlooop-XCP-demo writable only with MB-P read-only projection consumption

stop_conditions: owner approval required for expanded scope
